name: Crock-Pot Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Chuck or round steak, strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine steak strips, flour, salt, and pepper in the crockpot.
2. Stir well to coat the meat evenly.
3. Add remaining ingredients: onions, green peppers, tomatoes, mushrooms, molasses, soy sauce, and green beans.
4. Cook on LOW for 8 hours, or cook on HIGH for 5 hours followed by 2 hours on LOW.
